metadata.title: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 6 (sample subset, fictional for diff demo)

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: MODIFIED IN REV 6: Define and document account types; assign account managers; require approvals; monitor use; and review accounts at an organization-defined frequency using automated mechanisms where feasible.

parts.name: guidance
parts.prose: Account management includes account type identification, group membership conditions, and authorization assignment.

controls.title: Account Management | Automated System Account Management

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Support the management of system accounts using automated mechanisms.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: ADDED IN REV 6 (sample): Uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users and associate that identity with processes acting on their behalf.
